title: TUI Operator Console V1
description: Non-runnable feature root for the first operator console iteration. This bead owns the shared execution root and decomposes implementation, test, documentation, and review work for the TUI command, runtime loop, and panel formatting behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Plan covers CLI wiring, TUI rendering/data flow, automated validation, operator documentation, and final review.
Child beads preserve deterministic behavior by reusing existing repository storage and merge logic instead of duplicating orchestration state changes.
Expected file scope is limited to the CLI, a new TUI module, tests, and README updates unless implementation discovers a justified need for additional files.
